TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Thailand hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 100 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 513,120 sq km (maki' tay 51ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 510,890 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,230 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 68,200,824. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bangkok. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 5 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tńßailan* ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤aŇčkok. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *ajiraloŇčkorn, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Thailand hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 100 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 513,120 sq km (maki' tay 51ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 510,890 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,230 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 68,200,824. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bangkok. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 5 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tńßailan* ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤aŇčkok. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mawpuw s~…ēaziŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *ajiraloŇčkorn, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
